data.title: ConcertAI's TeraRecon surpasses 2,000 global customers in cloud-first SaaS transformation for healthcare providers.
data.description: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, TeraRecon, a prominent provider of AI-driven AV clinical workflows and interoperability solutions, has proudly revealed that their parent company, ConcertAI, has achieved a remarkable milestone of exceeding 2,000 customers worldwide. This accomplishment underscores the rapid advancement of the company's cloud-based SaaS conversion, offering an enterprise-grade platform that caters to various clinical imaging sectors like vascular surgery, interventional radiology, and cardiology. The success of their focused internal **initiatives has significantly contributed to this achievement.

data.title: Fidelity Investments launches Fidelity Trader+™ for advanced traders with real-time insights and dynamic tools across web, desktop, and mobile.
data.description: In Boston, Fidelity Investments® introduced Fidelity Trader+TM to cater to advanced traders’ needs. This integrated ecosystem offers real-time insights, dynamic visual analytics, and robust trading tools across web, desktop, and mobile platforms. Josh Krugman, SVP Brokerage, highlighted Fidelity's history of supporting traders through different economic conditions. The new platform aims to assist traders in navigating the market and growing their wealth.

data.title: EDB contributes to PostgreSQL 18 for improved performance, security, and flexibility. 35% of enterprises considering PostgreSQL for AI workloads.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, EnterpriseDB (EDB), a prominent Postgres® data and AI firm, unveiled its significant role in PostgreSQL 18, the latest edition of the renowned database that has consistently been a top choice worldwide. EDB's recent study with executives, "Sovereignty Matters," indicated that 35% of businesses are contemplating PostgreSQL for upcoming AI projects. The data also highlighted the importance of data sovereignty for organizations.

data.title: Deloitte finds consumers prioritize trust with AI innovators; 53% of U.S. consumers use or experiment with Generative AI.
data.description: In today's AI-driven world, consumers are increasingly seeking more than just technological advancements. The demand for privacy, transparency, and ethical security from tech providers is on the rise. A recent survey conducted in the United States revealed that over half, specifically 53% of consumers, are actively using or exploring innovations like GenAI. This indicates a significant shift towards the adoption of artificial intelligence technologies in mainstream society. The findings emphasize the importance of addressing not only technological advancements but also key consumer concerns surrounding privacy and ethics in the tech industry. The data was gathered in New York on September 25, 2025.

data.title: Australian market facing challenges in closing M&A deals, highlighted by ADNOC's $18.7 billion bid for Santos falling through due to valuation disputes and regulatory hurdles. Australia becoming a tough place for finalizing big transactions.
data.description: Australia is facing challenges in closing top M&A deals, highlighted by the collapse of Abu Dhabi National Oil Company's $18.7 billion takeover bid for Santos, the country's biggest natural gas supplier. Valuation disputes, regulatory obstacles, and unexpected revelations are complicating deal closures. ADNOC's investment arm cited factors like capital gains tax issues, regulatory uncertainties, and a reputational hit due to a methane leak scandal as reasons for withdrawing the bid. The leak involved a storage tank at Darwin LNG plant emitting up to 184 kilograms of methane per hour since 2006, affecting the deal negotiations. Australia is becoming one of the most difficult places globally for finalizing significant deals, as per reports.

data.title: UBCF commemorates 25th anniversary with new headquarters in Jonesboro, Arkansas. Offers support event for breast cancer patients and survivors.
data.description: In Jonesboro, Arkansas, the United Breast Cancer Foundation (UBCF) is commemorating its 25th anniversary with a Grand Opening Ceremony and Multi-day Mattress & Pink Bag Event® starting on September 25, 2025. This event aims to support breast cancer patients and survivors. The foundation will be celebrating this milestone throughout October.

data.title: opt.fun's high-speed options trading platform, Racks, hits $1 billion in trading volume, setting ambitious goals.
data.description: Today, Racks, a prominent platform for high-octane, ultra-gamified trading, revealed its official launch in New York. The platform boasts impressive growth and a dedicated community, having exceeded $1 billion in total trading volume. This announcement comes as Racks continues to establish itself as a key player in the trading industry.

BlackBerry Reports 2nd Quarter Adjusted EBITDA of $25.9 Million, Significantly Above Estimated $12.2 Million, and 2nd Quarter Free Cash Flow of $2.6 Million Compared to Negative $15 Million Year Over Year

data.title: I-care, a predictive maintenance provider, attains ISO 27001 certification for data security in Belgium.
data.description: I-care, a leader in predictive maintenance, has demonstrated its dedication to data security through attaining dual ISO 27001 certification for its internal operations and the I-see cloud platform. The certification was acquired in MONS, Belgium, on September 25, 2025. This development reaffirms I-care's commitment to ensuring the security of information, setting a high standard for maintaining confidentiality and integrity.
The State Duma passed in the first reading a bill according to which ninth graders who did not pass the GIA will be able to study a working profession for free.

data.title: SAP Taulia partners with Boost Payment Solutions to boost virtual cards momentum on Sept 25, 2025.
data.description: A global fintech leader, SAP Taulia, recently revealed a strategic partnership on September 25, 2025 with Boost Payment Solutions, a prominent provider of commercial card optimization. The aim is to enhance its virtual card offering.

data.title: Alliant Credit Union and PCs for People gather 7,000+ pounds of electronics for underserved communities in Chicagoland.
data.description: The Alliant Credit Union in Chicago has collaborated with the nonprofit organization PCs for People, resulting in 17 visits by the PCs for People Truck to the Alliant HQ. This partnership aims to gather electronic donations to support underserved communities in the Chicagoland area. The initiative is geared towards providing essential technological resources to those in need.

data.title: Hyundai IONIQ 9 named 2025 NWAPA Drive Revolution Vehicle of the Year. Santa Fe Hybrid AWD also recognized.
data.description: Hyundai's IONIQ 9 AWD Performance Calligraphy has dominated the NWAPA Awards by claiming top accolades for Vehicle of the Year and Best Battery Electric Vehicle. Another success came in the form of the Santa Fe Hybrid Calligraphy AWD, which was named Best Hybrid Electric Vehicle. This achievement comes as Hyundai continues to shine in the industry. The awards were received in FOUNTAIN VALLEY, Calif., on September 25, 2025.

data.title: 2026 Toyota GR Corolla offers improved body rigidity, engine temperature control, and two grades: GR Corolla and GR Corolla Premium Plus.
data.description: Enhancements to the structure of the 2026 GR Corolla have increased body rigidity, while a new secondary air intake system has been implemented to enhance engine temperature control and performance. The vehicle is offered in two grades: GR Corolla and GR Corolla Premium Plus. The JBL Premium Sound System in these models has been upgraded with Active Sound Control technology.

data.title: AAA partners with Integra Ledger to offer blockchain-based document authentication service, enhancing trust in source documents.
data.description: The American Arbitration Association (AAA), a prominent figure in alternative dispute resolution (ADR) globally, has recently revealed a new initiative to enhance the credibility of source documents in light of mounting worries surrounding AI-generated counterfeits. Unveiled in New York on September 25, 2025, this collaboration aims to reinforce trust in documents amidst growing concerns.

data.title: $11M from Mohamed Bin Zayed Foundation for Special Olympics International to boost inclusive education globally - expanding in 10 countries.
data.description: An 11 million-dollar grant has been allocated to aid the efforts of the Special Olympics Global Center for Inclusion in Education, located in Abu Dhabi. This funding is set to expand the Special Olympics Unified Champion Schools program in 10 countries and facilitate the training of more than 6,000 educators worldwide in inclusive practices.

data.title: Broadridge and WealthFeed partner for advisor lead generation, nurturing investors through life events.
data.description: A recent development in New York on September 25, 2025 reveals that Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc. (NYSE: BR), a prominent global fintech leader, has formed a strategic partnership that allows advisors to easily locate and proactively engage with investors as they go through significant life events. This partnership includes a minority stake investment and aims to streamline the process for advisors to nurture investors during pivotal moments. This groundbreaking collaboration is set to revolutionize the way advisors approach client interactions, leveraging technology to enhance the investor experience.

data.title: Wayfair to release Q3 2025 financial results on Oct 28; conference call scheduled. NYSE: W. Market opening.
data.description: In Boston on September 25, 2025, Wayfair Inc. (NYSE: W), a leading home goods retailer, revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the third quarter ending September 30, 2025, prior to the market opening on October 28, 2025. Alongside the financial report, Wayfair is set to conduct a conference call to discuss these results.

data.title: Biomedicines to present Phase 1 results for GB-0895 at the European Respiratory Society Congress, showing prolonged half-life and optimized dosing.
data.description: A novel anti-TSLP monoclonal antibody known as GB-0895, characterized by its high affinity, has exhibited an extended half-life along with sustained pharmacological effects in individuals with asthma. GB-0895 is designed for convenient administration via a single subcutaneous injection every six months. This development was reported from SOMERVILLE, Massachusetts, on September 25, 2025.
